general_provisions: This bill modifies the Utah Fits All Scholarship Program.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet> clarifies that eligible students must be under 19 years old as of September 1 of the scholarship year;<hr><ltbullet>establishes consumer protection standards for scholarship expenses and reimbursements;  <hr><ltbullet>enhances program oversight and compliance mechanisms; <hr><ltbullet>improves customer service and marketplace operation standards; and <hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
